seoTitle: Wholesale Vapes Partnership | B2B Programs | WholesaleVapesUSA.com
seoDescription: Partner with WholesaleVapesUSA.com: wholesale vapes, 48h shipping, B2B portal access, 5,000+ SKUs, daily price monitoring, and dedicated account support.
heroHeading: Wholesale vapes and bulk distribution partnership programs.
heroSecondaryHeading: Wholesale vapes account registration for professional retailers.
heroSubhead: At WholesaleVapesUSA.com, our wholesale program is built on the pillars of Consistency, Quality, and Speed. We provide a streamlined B2B portal where you can buy wholesale vapes, track your 48h shipping, and access high-resolution marketing assets for your own site.
whyIntro: Our wholesale partnership model is built for retailers and distributors who need depth, pricing discipline, and responsive logistics support.

benefits.title: Inventory Depth
benefits.description: Access to over 5,000+ SKUs across CBD, THC, and Nicotine.

benefits.title: Price Protection
benefits.description: We monitor the market daily to ensure you have the best wholesale prices for sale.

benefits.title: Dedicated Account Managers
benefits.description: "Clinical" support for all your logistical needs.

howIntro: Four steps from catalog browse to delivered inventory.

steps.title: Browse
steps.description: Explore categories and SKUs that fit your store or distribution channel.

steps.title: Submit
steps.description: Send your business details, interests, and estimated volume via the form below.

steps.title: Invoice
steps.description: Receive a formal quote or invoice with payment options (crypto, Revolut, or other).

steps.title: Ship
steps.description: Orders ship after confirmation; tracking shared for supported lanes.

discountIntro: Savings stack with your quoted line — your invoice reflects the method you confirm at checkout.

Custom brackets — ask your account manager

formIntro: Prefer a dedicated page? Use the

wholesaleRequestPage.heading: Wholesale request
wholesaleRequestPage.intro: Complete the form and our team will follow up with a quote. Same form as on the wholesale overview.
wholesaleRequestPage.thankYouIntro: Our B2B team will review your request and typically reply within one business day with pricing and onboarding steps.
wholesaleRequestPage.thankYouUrgentHelpBody: Email us and reference your business name.

faqIntro: Quick answers on MOQ, terms, payments, shipping, and lab documentation.

faqs.question: What is your minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
faqs.answer: Our standard wholesale MOQ is $750 before discounts. You can mix and match eligible SKUs across categories to reach it. For a detailed breakdown, see our MOQ guide.

faqs.question: Do you offer credit terms?
faqs.answer: New accounts typically start on prepayment (crypto, Revolut, or agreed bank transfer). Established partners may request net terms — your account manager will review volume and history.

faqs.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We support cryptocurrency (BTC, ETH, USDT) with 10% off, Revolut with 5% off, and other arrangements case by case. All orders are confirmed with a written invoice before shipment.

faqs.question: How fast do wholesale orders ship?
faqs.answer: Most paid orders are processed within 24–48 hours, subject to verification and compliance checks. Transit time depends on carrier and destination; we share tracking when available.

faqs.question: Do products include lab testing or COAs?
faqs.answer: Hemp-derived and related SKUs are sourced with batch documentation where applicable. Ask for COAs or compliance packets when you submit your inquiry so we can match your state’s requirements.

faqs.question: Is wholesale limited to US retailers?
faqs.answer: We primarily serve US retailers and distributors. International inquiries are reviewed individually for product eligibility, duties, and regulations.
